title: ADULT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: LA PINE PARKS AND RECREATION ADULT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education, recreation, health, and business programs. 16405 First Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 536-2223 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-2223 Contact (541) 385-9458 Wynn Malikowski [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, payment plans and scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Cities of La Pine, Sunriver, and Three Rivers Services: Continuing Education GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction General Recreational Activities/Sports Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion Recreation Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
